modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer experiencing continuous paper jams and not picking up paper.

full_description_text: The user reported a paper jam in the printer. It keeps jamming the paperwork repeatedly. The printer is unable to pick up any paper, causing delays. This issue needs immediate attention to restore functionality.
short_description: Printer experiencing continuous paper jams and not picking up paper.
description: The user reported a paper jam in the printer. It keeps jamming the paperwork repeatedly. The printer is unable to pick up any paper, causing delays. This issue needs immediate attention to restore functionality.
